user.title: Device type
user.description: Pick the device definition that matches your hardware and name the device. Your own YAML files in the `modbus_connect` folder of the Home Assistant configuration directory are listed too.

data_description.filename: The YAML file describing the registers and entities of your device.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this device. Leave empty to use manufacturer, model, and entity ID prefix from the device file.

connection.title: Modbus gateway
connection.description: Connect {device} through its Modbus TCP gateway (or directly, if the device speaks Modbus TCP itself).

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the Modbus TCP gateway.
data_description.port: TCP port of the gateway. Almost always 502.
data_description.slave_id: Unit/slave ID of the Modbus device behind the gateway (0–255). Prefilled with the device file's factory default.
data_description.prefix: Used at the start of all entity IDs of this device, e.g. `sensor.[prefix]_[entity]`. Leave empty to let Home Assistant derive entity IDs from the device name.

reconfigure.title: Device type
reconfigure.description: Pick the device definition that matches your hardware and name the device. Your own YAML files in the `modbus_connect` folder of the Home Assistant configuration directory are listed too.

data_description.filename: The YAML file describing the registers and entities of your device.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this device. Leave empty to use manufacturer, model, and entity ID prefix from the device file.

reconfigure_connection.title: Modbus gateway
reconfigure_connection.description: Update the connection to the Modbus TCP gateway for {device}.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the Modbus TCP gateway.
data_description.port: TCP port of the gateway. Almost always 502.
data_description.slave_id: Unit/slave ID of the Modbus device behind the gateway (0–255).
data_description.prefix: Used at the start of all entity IDs of this device, e.g. `sensor.[prefix]_[entity]`. Changing it only affects entities created afterwards. Leave empty to let Home Assistant derive entity IDs from the device name.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the gateway. Check host and port, and make sure the gateway is reachable.

abort.already_configured: A device with this gateway and Modbus device ID is already configured.
abort.no_device_files: No valid device definition files were found.

data_description.scan_interval: Default polling interval in seconds. The device file and individual entities can override this.
